However, they are forced to unite when a greedy businessman named Dayat threatens to seize their village's ancestral land. Furious that Dayat's company has desecrated Wisnu’s ancestral graves and plans to destroy a beautiful local waterfall for development, the two rivals must team up to stop the land grab.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 2
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 148
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Naura: Suara Dari Mas Kambing
programme.desc: Naura (Ina Marika) possesses a mysterious power: every 'curse' or vow she speaks comes true. However, she loses her supernatural gift the moment she falls in love with Satria (Rezca Syam), a humble goat herder.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 200
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 2
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: MAS CAR WASH TYDAK RAMAH BINTANG 1
programme.desc: Resna’s plan for revenge against Ranti who hit her brother in an accident takes an unexpected turn. Instead of getting even, she ends up falling for Didan, the charming owner of the carwash.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 149
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Bulan Terbelah di Hati Mas Silver
programme.desc: Fikri is a 'Silver Man' (street performer) who falls in love with Bulan, a beautiful municipal police officer (Satpol PP). Despite their frequent romantic encounters, Bulan remains professional. When duty calls, she doesn't hesitate to arrest Fikri, leading to a complicated 'cat-and-mouse' romance between the law and the street.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 201
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jerit Malam Berujung Cinta
programme.desc: Karina (Indah Nicole) joins an outdoor adventure club just to get closer to her crush. Dressed inappropriately in a miniskirt and thin clothes for a camping trip, she forgets to bring a jacket. Suddenly, a mysterious man named Tomi (Fendy Chow) hands her a jacket, though no one in the club seems to know who he is. During a terrifying night initiation, Karina realizes there’s more to Tomi than meets the eye.

programme.title: MENCINTAI LEWAT JALUR LANGIT YGY
programme.desc: Arya's love story that has been lived with Caca turns out to have another story, can Arya escape from her habits or even match with another woman?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 201
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.desc: Naura (Ina Marika) possesses a mysterious power: every 'curse' or vow she speaks comes true. However, she loses her supernatural gift the moment she falls in love with Satria (Rezca Syam), a humble goat herder.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 150
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Cantik Itu Relatif, Pasang Cincin Ke Jarimu Itu Alternatif
programme.desc: A tragedy leaves Bima (Hardi Fadhillah) grieving the loss of his fiancée and a precious ancestral ring. Juminten (Ika Dihardjo), a humble traveling fish vendor, rescues Bima and finds the missing ring. When she tries it on, a miraculous transformation occurs: her dull skin instantly glows, turning the simple fish vendor into a stunning beauty.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 202
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Janji Jangan Love Ugal Ugalan Ya Dek
programme.desc: After failing to get married three times for bizarre reasons, Jelita (Raisya Bawazier) suspects she is being haunted by her past. She remembers cruelly rejecting a chubby boy back in school and hires a friend to find him, convinced he is the source of her bad luck. Little does she know, the boy has transformed into Dani (Masaji Wijayanto), a handsome and athletic man.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 4
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 150
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Cantik Itu Relatif, Pasang Cincin Ke Jarimu Itu Alternatif
programme.desc: A tragedy leaves Bima (Hardi Fadhillah) grieving the loss of his fiancée and a precious ancestral ring. Juminten (Ika Dihardjo), a humble traveling fish vendor, rescues Bima and finds the missing ring. When she tries it on, a miraculous transformation occurs: her dull skin instantly glows, turning the simple fish vendor into a stunning beauty.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 33
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 2
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Tua Pun Boleh - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan ini menampilkan pelbagai aktiviti lasak penuh aksi yang bakal diharungi oleh para selebriti veteran yang mengikuti aktiviti ini.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 11
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 5
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 26
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 3
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 13
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza musin kedua menampilakan Tauke, Ropi, Zaibo dan ramai lagi meredah kampung kampung dan melakukan pelbagai aktiviti.

programme.title: Stand Up Comedy Otai - EP 9
programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 4
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 3
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik minggu ini untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2021 - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 2
programme.desc: Program untuk kanak-kanak bagi menyuarakan pendapat dan berkongsi buah fikiran mereka secara spontan.

programme.title: Super Wira - EP 6
programme.desc: Aman tiada kuasa istimewa tidak seperti ayahnya, ketua kumpulan Super Wira. Ibunya telah diculik oleh penjahat super yang misteri dan Aman cuba untuk menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Terbaekk! - EP 3
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 1
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Makan - EP 9
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 9
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Masaklah Kau - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancangan masakan yang menguji kreativiti dan kecekapan selebriti untuk menyediakan hidangan kepada tetamu misteri menggunakan 3 bahan yang tersedia.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 2
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Konnichiwa Superlawak - EP 3
programme.desc: Saksikan Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya, Tomok, dan rakan-rakan bola sepak Superlawak FC menjelajah ke Jepun demi menyahut cabaran perlawanan persahabatan menentang pasukan tempatan di bumi Jepun!

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 7
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 5
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Generasi Gamerz - EP 5
programme.desc: Dua selebriti "Gamerz" akan bekerjasama dengan ibu atau bapa mereka untuk bertanding di dalam cabaran permainan video popular seperti Mobile Legends, FIFA20 & banyak lagi!

programme.title: Gelak 90 Saat S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Mampukah 6 kumpulan pelawak membuat para juri misteri ketawa dalam masa 90 saat demi merebut ganjaran wang tunai pada setiap minggu?

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 4
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Terbaekk! - EP 3
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Opera Sabun Boboi - EP 5

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 2

programme.title: Masak Wars - EP 7
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, 5 peserta mewakili negeri masing-masing akan bertanding untuk membuktikan masakan negeri mereka yang terbaik. Dihoskan oleh Keanu Azman.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Legenda Puteri Qaseh kembali untuk musim ke-2! Sebagai Permaisuri Kayajaya, dia menghadapi cabaran konspirasi merampas takhta, wabak Achum mengancam nyawa dan dijodohkan dengan Putera Nusaria.

programme.title: Autumn In Wales
programme.desc: Aira kecewa apabila mendapat tahu tunangnya, Darwish mempunyai kekasih baru bernama Marissa. Dia cuba memenangi hati Darwish, namun ketika mencuba perasaannya berubah.

programme.title: Geng Gajet - EP 5
programme.desc: Geng Gajet mengikuti sekumpulan rakan dari pelbagai latar belakang yang menyelesaikan masalah mereka setiap hari menggunakan kemahiran digital & pengekodan mereka.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Terbaekk! - EP 4
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 4
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Renovate - EP 2
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Daiyan Trisha, dia akan mencari rumah yang asalnya biasa atau lama tetapi telah diubahsuai menjadi cantik dengan bantuan arkitek yang berpengalaman.

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 10
programme.desc: Oya terkejut kerana mendapat bungkusan hadiah daripada pengirim yang tidak dikenali. Tanpa disangka, Oya semakin pandai menggunakan ilmu kejururawatan untuk menolong orang yang cedera.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Benci - EP 24
programme.desc: Semua wanita yang didekati Migo hanya untuk memenuhi keperluan pertaruhannya bersamai dengan rakan-rakan dan juga membuktikan dirinya sebagai playboy sejati.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 4

programme.title: Chellame Chellame
programme.desc: Separated at birth, twins Kavin and Nila unknowingly meet at school, setting off truths that force their estranged parents, Vijayalakshmi and Vikram, to confront their forbidden marriage and the painful past that tore their family apart.

programme.title: Annam
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Annam, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Kayal
programme.desc: Abandoned by her father and coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to be her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother and sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Moondru Mudichu
programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.desc: Five justice fighters, the ''Tabac Force'', go on a retreat to strengthen their team cohesion. Until a sort of emperor of evil decides to wipe out the planet. Zany sketches, tight latex suits, DIY special effects, actors' performances: a bizarre gore fable but without toxicity!

programme.title: Au-Dela Des Murs
programme.desc: One morning, Lina is getting ready to go to Baumettes prison to attend her first visit. Nadjim, her boyfriend, has recently been imprisoned. Before leaving, she gathers things to take to him.

programme.title: La Confrontation
programme.desc: In a police station, Maxime, 17, is being questioned one last time today. Anxiety rises: she will soon have to face her greatest fear. Finding herself in the same room as the man who hurt her when she was a child, her godfather.

programme.title: L'audience
programme.desc: After having fled the Congo and clandestinely crossed eleven countries, Peggy, Simon and their three children are awaiting their hearing which will decide if they are accepted as refugees in Canada. Between past ghosts, future hopes and legal mazes, the film delves into the struggle by the Nkunga Mbala family.

programme.title: Hj Lim, Le Son Du Silence
programme.desc: A virtuoso pianist, Lim Hyun Jung revisits some of the places from her life: the family home in Anyang, Korea, Paris's prestigious Conservatoire National Superieur de Musique et de Danse, the church in Compiegne and the Baeknyeong Buddhist temple, discussing her loves, her sorrows, her doubts and her successes...

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 6
programme.desc: Etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 42
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara - EP 9
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 51
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca - EP 37
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 2
programme.desc: Dog decides to take part in the discus competition. But to win he'll have to exert an incredible level of self control and overcome his instinct to run after it.

programme.title: Les Danger - EP 7
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Les Danger - EP 8
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 44
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 25
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 35
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 21
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 7
programme.desc: Flat tints, geometrization of lines, sharp contours... A landscape painter, with sky and water as recurring themes, Veronique Sudry shows both the omnipotence and the poetry of nature where beauty and unease coexist.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 6
programme.desc: Born in Rwanda and arriving in France at the age of six months, Mamari chose humor to address her personal story, marked by family trauma and mental health issues. On stage, notably in ''Too Funny to Die'', she breaks taboos with powerful dark humor.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 88
programme.desc: He's French and a very young vice world champion in boxing, light heavyweight category: Yojerlin Cesar is Mathieu Laurent's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 10
programme.desc: A meeting with artisans reinventing coffee and chocolate, blending tradition, creativity and boldness, in a subtle dialogue of flavors. Yadh Elyes, master roaster in Paris' 6th arrondissement, offers exceptional coffees. Richard Orlinski is invited to taste rare beans from Tanzania and Panama. Chocolatier Clement Niel has settled in Bangkok, where he fuses expertise and local flavors.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 3
programme.desc: The guide Pascale Roy Lafontaine welcomes a group who have come to join his surf camp in Haleiwa, in the Hawaiian archipelago. The perfect opportunity for a hike along the Kuli'ou'ou ridge and admire its spectacular panorama, all amidst the lush vegetation of a unique ecosystem.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 9
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 24
programme.desc: On the menu: waffle bar, potato and cheese curd egg casserole, solo chakchouka, khachapuri.

programme.title: Parlons eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Alterrenative Voyages - EP 2
programme.desc: Encounter with a collective of Senegalese women who have taken the initiative to collect and recycle the plastic waste of their village. Followed by a visit to a school that educates and trains its students in sustainable agriculture.

programme.title: Ma Vie, Ma Gueule
programme.desc: « I am 55 years old and I still don't know what my nature is. » Barberie Bichette, known as Barbie, is going through an existential crisis and piles up often comical misadventures. An intimate portrait of a woman in three acts, a comedy, a tragedy, an epiphany.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Deliberations
programme.desc: The jury of the Red Carpet Film Festival meets to establish the awards list after deliberations. But artistic considerations give way to more personal issues.

programme.title: Nous, Les Europeens - EP 16
programme.desc: Swedish Lapland is known for its deep forests and northern lights, but it is also a region at the crossroads of major strategic and industrial issues. Two hundred kilometers north of the Arctic Circle, the subsoil of the town of Kiruna hides a treasure: the largest iron mine in Europe. In 2023, a deposit of phosphorus and rare earths was discovered there, perhaps the most important on the continent. Sweden has therefore made an unprecedented decision: to relocate part of the town.

programme.title: Movie - Lathi Charge
programme.desc: Police constable Muruganantham gets suspended after he laththi-charges Vella, a criminal and a notorious gangster's son. What happens when he faces their wrath of vengeance while trapped in a building with his son?

programme.title: Movie - Aarathu Sinam
programme.desc: Police officer Aravind resorts to alcohol after his wife and daughter get killed by criminals. He looks forward to regaining his old self by taking up the case of a serial killer.

programme.title: Movie - Kanmani Unakaga
programme.desc: Kanmani Unakkaga is a 1999 Tamil-language film, directed by the duo Ravi-Raja. The film stars Ishaq Hussaini and Suvaluxmi, while Senthil and Jennifer portrayed supporting roles.

programme.title: Movie - Kanna
programme.desc: Annapoorani, a class 10 student, encounters Kanna, a tour guide, during her school educational trip to Ooty. She develops feelings for him and runs away from home to meet him on her scooter.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Naan
programme.desc: A man burns down his family home after finding out about the illegal relations between his mother and uncle that caused his father to commit suicide. After being released from the juvenile prison, he boards a bus to Chennai to begin a new life.

programme.title: Movie - Aintham Padai
programme.desc: A girl from one of two rival gangs falls in love with a boy from the other gang. Unfortunately, she is married off to the wrong brother; irked by this, she begins to plot the downfall of her in-laws.

programme.title: Movie - Vallavan
programme.desc: Valluvan loves Swapna even though she is three years older than him. Although she reciprocates initially, the age difference and his past with a classmate lead her to break up with him.

programme.title: Movie - Red
programme.desc: Red is a local goon who is passionate about reforming children via education and development. While working towards his noble causes and dealing with his rivals, he also tries to help a girl he loves.

programme.title: Movie - Arul
programme.desc: Arul, the youngest of four brothers, faces the wrath of his father as he takes the blame for a mistake committed by one of his brothers. Their relationship worsens when Arul is forced into politics.

programme.title: Movie - Jeyam Kondaan
programme.desc: When Arjun relocates from London to Chennai to start a business, he finds out that his late father had a second family and that his half-sister Brinda is trying to sell their ancestral property.

programme.title: Movie - Karunkaali
programme.desc: Kanimozhi, a doctor, falls in love with and marries Ravi, despite his dark past. However, when he begins to make advances on her patient, she must fight to save her patient and her marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Keezhatheru Kitcha

programme.title: Movie - Viyabari
programme.desc: A businessman who wants to be rich loses out on family and social life. He marries a girl who loves him only because she would prove profitable to his business. He realizes what he lost after the death of his mother.

programme.title: Movie - Jay Jay
programme.desc: Jamuna, who believes in destiny, writes her address on a currency note and tells Jagan if he finds it, she will marry him. Years later, Jagan manages to find the note and tries to reunite with her.

programme.title: Movie - Kabali
programme.desc: Kabali fights against the oppression faced by the Tamils working in Malaysia as labourers. However, he is jailed for twenty-five years and once released, he sets out to seek his revenge.

programme.title: Movie - LKG
programme.desc: LKG, a councillor of a small town, aspires to become the chief minister of the state. He enlists the help of the corporates to impress the public but faces threat from another politician.

programme.title: Movie -Devathayai Kandaein
programme.desc: Babu, a tea vendor, falls in love with Uma, a rich girl, and she too loves him for his sincerity. However, Babu sues her for cheating, when she accepts a doctor's proposal to have a secured future.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND - FRI 22 MAY

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last seven Premier League games (D1 L6), last having a longer run between December 1994 and February 1995 (10).

programme.title: Arsenal vs Burnley (MW37) - EP 368
programme.desc: Arsenal have only lost their final home league game in one of the last 28 seasons (W23 D4) and are unbeaten in 14 since a 2-1 loss to Aston Villa in 2010-11 (W12 D2).

programme.title: PL Preview 2025/26 - EP 33
programme.desc: We preview the final day of an enthralling Premier League season, including Arsenal’s trip to Crystal Palace, Manchester City hosting Aston Villa and Spurs taking on Everton.

programme.title: Bournemouth vs Manchester City (MW37) - EP 369
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last 16 Premier League games (W8 D8), the longest run of any side in the competition this season. The Cherries have won four of their last five, as many as they had in their previous 22 combined (D12 L6).

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal (MW38) (Live) - EP 373
programme.desc: As a top-flight side, Crystal Palace have never lost when playing their final league match of the season at home (W8 D4), most recently beating Aston Villa 5-0 in 2023-24.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Aston Villa (MW38) (Live) - EP 376
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 19 of their last 20 Premier League home games against Aston Villa, winning each of the last 15 since a 2-0 loss in April 2007.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Manchester United (MW38) (Live) - EP 371
programme.desc: Brighton have the highest win rate against Manchester United of any side in Premier League history both overall (47% - 8/17) and at home (63% - 5/8).

programme.title: Liverpool vs Brentford (MW38) (Live) - EP 375
programme.desc: Liverpool lost 3-2 in the reverse fixture against Brentford, but have never lost consecutive league games against the Bees before.

programme.title: Sunderland vs Chelsea (MW38) (Live) - EP 378
programme.desc: Of all teams to have played in more than five Premier League campaigns, Sunderland have the lowest win rate in their final game of the season, winning just one of their 16 matches (6% - D3 L12).

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Bournemouth (MW38) (Live) - EP 377
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are winless in all seven of their Premier League games against Bournemouth (D3 L4), both the most they’ve faced a side without ever winning, and the most the Cherries have faced a side without losing in the competition.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Everton (MW38) (Live) - EP 379
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last 10 home league games (D4 L6), their second-longest run in their league history after a 14-game streak between October 1993 and April 1994.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Leeds United (MW38) (Live) - EP 380
programme.desc: If West Ham fail to win they will be relegated from the Premier League for the third time, after 2002-03 and 2010-11. It will also mean 2026-27 will be the first top-flight season not to feature any teams beginning with 'W' since 1910-11.

programme.title: Fulham vs Newcastle United (MW38) (Live) - EP 374
programme.desc: Fulham have lost six of their last eight Premier League games against Newcastle, with both exceptions coming last season (W2).

programme.title: Burnley vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW38) (Live) - EP 372
programme.desc: Burnley have lost just one of their last 10 Premier League games against Wolves (W5 D4), and are looking for their second double against them in the competition, after 2020-21.

programme.title: FS MMA Diego Gonzalez vs. Matt Thorpe
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Diego 'The Silencer' Gonzalez locks horns with Matt '12 Gauge' Thorpe. An action packed welterweight bout in St. Petersburg, Russia sees these two fighters go the distance.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Chad Dawson vs. Antonio Tarver II
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Light Heavyweight 'Bad' Chad Dawson (27-0, 17 KOs) vs. Antonio 'Magic Man' Tarver (27-5, 19 KOs). Held at the Hard Rock Hotel and Casino, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA on May 9, 2009, it's Dawson's first defense of the IBF Light Heavyweight and IBO Light Heavyweight titles.

programme.title: WCK
programme.desc: K-1 World MAX returns from Tokyo, Japan, highlighted by the -70kg World Championship Tournament opening round, and two Championship bouts. For the K-1 World GP Super Bantamweight Championship, Kaneko Akihiro (26-3) meets Koji Ikeda (16-7), and also on the card is a Women's Atomweight Championship bout between Matsutani Kira (13-1) and Akira Suematsu (8-1). Don't miss a stacked night of fights - K-1 World Max on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 110
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and it rains. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch the flowers bloom. Another cloud appears and it rains pink, Tubby Custard!

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S5) - EP 4
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'snail' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about snails!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: When Messy accidentally sets Farmer Fuddle's sheep loose, he must help round them up in time for their annual wool shearing. But will Messy be brave enough to get a fur cut of his own?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 46
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are in the Gulf of Mexico to learn about Manatees, peaceful water mammals that spend most of their time either sleeping or eating sea-grass.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired, and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, mum and dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Andy heads to Brazil and meets a troop of capuchin monkeys who lead him to some honey.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 42
programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 41
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Glitch is not happy when he has to work with Kyan in a Hollywood film.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 52
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are in snowy Norway to learn about the Sami reindeer. The reindeers are migrating and need to get a ferry to their warmer summer home.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 14
programme.desc: Yong Bao tells Thomas the story of how he came to have a magnificent tiger emblem on his tender.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: Duck sees some flying, migrating ducks in the sky and decides he would like to try it too.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: When Sarah and Duck are racing paper planes, they chance upon an exciting discovery.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Stanley and the children tour the museum and quickly realise there's nothing about them or their friends, so they make a new exhibit all about their town today!

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: JoJo wishes Gran Gran could join her on a bike ride in the park, so Gran Gran decides to fix her old bicycle. After a good clean and fix-up, she's ready to ride!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels think about life's big questions, and gain their Philosophy badges.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When lightning strikes Academy Island, it causes a power cut. Can the Go Jetters rescue their trapped friends without the power they need to call for Click-ons?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song "We're Chilli When It's Hot"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song "All My Friends" to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing about the wonders of Tubby Custard and Toast.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 7
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 8

programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 34
programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 35
programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: Chilli is excited to see Jalapeno attempt a tart-jumping record. But when Evil Pea ruins the attempt in order to steal the record, Supertato and Captain Chilli must save the day!

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 21

programme.desc: Ukrainian vet, Maria Mykytiuk, lived an idyllic life until Russia invaded her home of Bucha in 2022. She survived violence and the death of her best friend. Now Maria is safe in Australia, and using her voice to help Ukraine.

programme.title: Off Country S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Follow the lives of seven Indigenous students who spend a year boarding at one of the oldest and most elite boarding schools in the country, Geelong Grammar.

programme.title: Stuff The British Stole S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: In 2022, a tattered black doll was sent from Britain to the First Nations people of lutruwita/Tasmania, carrying with it a devastating story of a stolen child. Marc Fennell unravels a story of heartbreak and injustice.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones ventures into the heart of Borneo's jungle to look for wild orangutan, following a team of dedicated scientists whose work is leading to new insights into one of the world's most intelligent & elusive great apes.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue S17 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend (2026) - EP 42

programme.title: Offsiders (2026) - EP 16

programme.title: Island Echoes with Nornie Bero S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Join acclaimed Torres Strait Islander chef and cultural ambassador Nornie Bero in Island Echoes, a vibrant journey through the breathtaking landscapes and rich traditions of her homeland.

programme.title: Field To Feast S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Thanh "The Fruit Nerd" Truong takes a deep dive into Australian tomatoes, more specifically Roma tomatoes and enjoys a traditional Italian feast, whilst making home-made passata and gnocchi.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight (2026) - EP 42
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Common Cause S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by outside forces, the Solomon Island Rangers Association visits the Torres Strait in Australia to learn how traditional knowledge and western science are being harnessed to protect culture and the environment.

programme.title: Movie: The Curse Of King Tut's Tomb Part 2

programme.title: Movie: The Librarian: The Return To King Solomon's Mines
programme.desc: Adventurer Flynn Carsen receives a secret map to King Solomon's Mines. When the map is stolen, Flynn sets out to find the map and the Key of Solomon's book, without which the map is useless anyway.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains’ is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime rpt - EP 21
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money rpt - EP 21
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Channel Japan - EP 7
programme.desc: Channel Japan offers a fresh look at the latest in the economy, business, technology, culture and sightseeing of Japan.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - PGA TOUR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: Reaction Sports
programme.desc: The best of extreme sports action from around the world.

programme.title: CNBC Sports
programme.desc: For the 31st time, the Prague International Marathon once again becomes an indispensable part of the world’s running events. The ultimate race of the season, the Prague International Marathon is awarded the Elite Label by World Athletics and ranks among the world’s most prestigious marathons.

programme.title: Hail Baja Rally 2026
programme.desc: Hail Toyota International Baja is one of the most prominent motorsport events in the region. It serves as a key destination for drivers and teams from around the world to test their readiness in a truly competitive environment ahead of major challenges like the Dakar Rally.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: The CNBC Debate
programme.desc: The CNBC Debate leverages CNBC’s unparalleled reach to the world’s most influential people and gets them to debate the most important issues of our time. This panel discussion format brings together heads of state, policy makers and business leaders onto one stage for a discussion like no other.

programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?

programme.desc: Williams Team Principal James Vowles and F1 Academy drivers' champion Abbi Pulling show how advanced simulation is shaping the future of Formula 1.

programme.title: Power Players S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Major League Baseball Hall of Famer Cal Ripken Jr. and his brother Bill have turned youth sports into big business. But can they chase profits while preserving what's best for kids?

programme.title: Power Players S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Toronto Raptors President Masai Ujiri leads the only non-US team in the National Basketball Association, and he's spearheading an effort to take the game global.

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets some of the world's most advanced, intelligent, robots. Will the creation of a synthetic species with human-like intelligence improve the human experience, or end it?

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Can we have real intimacy with machines? Emily Chang explores the future of such connections and the technologies powering a growing market of relationships-on-demand.

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: From brain implants that allow paralyzed patients to communicate to the wearable devices enhancing our capabilities, brain-computer interfaces could change the way we use our minds forever.

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology. In this episode of Posthuman, we explore the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how we die.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 40 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

Hideyoshi joins Shibata Katsuie (Yamaguchi Makiya)’s campaign against the Uesugi, but clashes with him over strategy. Meanwhile, Chika falls under suspicion of secret dealings with another warlord. Seeking the truth, Koichiro goes to a village she has been visiting, where he uncovers the painful past she has long kept hidden.

While Madoka remains wary of the technology, veteran judge Hiba Katsuhiro-presiding with her over a murder case involving a son accused of killing his father-grows increasingly reliant on the AI’s verdict. Determined to uncover the truth on her own, Madoka pursues a conclusion different from the AI’s.

programme.desc: In western India lies a town known as the "Diamond City," where rough diamonds from around the world are cut and polished by low‑paid craftsmen who have long supported the global diamond industry. As natural diamond prices fall by 40 percent and major companies suffer huge losses, life in the Diamond City itself is being shaken.

programme.title: Story Land in Classical Japanese
programme.desc: This programme presents masterpieces of classical Japanese literature - in both original forms and modern translations - with easy-to-understand imagery that conveys the world view of ancient Japan.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: We visit Oita, famous for its hot springs, and meet many warm-hearted people, like a wrangler who entertains visitors with duck races and an artist interacting with locals through her art.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programme.desc: Peaches take the spotlight - from June to October, new varieties appear every two weeks letting people enjoy them for months. Big, sweet and juicy, discover the charm of Japan's finest peaches.

programme.title: Hit the Road 5min.
programme.desc: Take a drive in Kagoshima! After circling the ever-erupting Sakurajima, we head to the southern tip for a sand bath utilising geothermal energy where you'll feel the vitality of the Earth!

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: With its splendid branches and white plum blossoms, this famous painting is known for captivating Van Gogh - discover why people were able to tell this was a specific tree at Kameido Umeyashiki.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a sumo highlights programme for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from May 23, Day 14 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Tokyo.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Tsukamoto Yoshiharu (Architect) visits Nara. Long ago, people in Nara preserved ice by building an icehouse on a mountain ridge, showing how architecture can make use of natural characteristics.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: How do a cast and crew prepare for a kabuki performance? Actor Kataoka Ainosuke guides us through the rehearsals and technical complexities of a recent nationwide tour.

programme.title: Building the Sun
programme.desc: ITER is an international attempt to meet humanity's energy needs by harnessing nuclear fusion. We take you within the ITER project to see how close the technology is to becoming a reality.

programme.title: 100 Years of Osaka: Architecture Al
programme.desc: Osaka's Midosuji Avenue, and the subway that runs beneath it, have been key to the city's development. We look at 12 groundbreaking buildings that embody a dynamic period in Osaka's history.

programme.title: History Uncovered

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: A scientific trek into Earth's memory - see Anami's ancient strata, the singing sands of Kotobikihama, and the geological time gaps of Uradome's rocks.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: On a Snowy Night: We come across a tranquil and snow-covered Edo cityscape, but there's something in the air - the aroma of foods both sweet and savoury that helps townspeople keep warm in the winter.

programme.title: Demolition Kingdom
programme.desc: With a Guinness World Record as the largest wooden architectural structure, the Grand Ring was built from enough wood for 1,000 houses. We watch as it is carefully taken apart to be reused elsewhere.

programme.title: Railway Kingdom Japan: Shinkansen

programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 499

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 3
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 5
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2813
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Don't You Know Life is a Journey?
programme.desc: Uncover the unique life stories of people from mainland China, Japan and other Asian regions, getting a closer look at their attitudes, choices, family, career, ideals and values.

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: Big City Shop 2026
programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.title: Happy Old Buddies

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong

programme.desc: The fourth season of this popular cross-regional music talent contest designed for adults aged 35 and above expands global recruitment, welcoming contestants from Hong Kong, Macao, mainland China, North America, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia.
