programme.title: Not Others - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 21
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 25
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Heavy rain has caused serious car accidents, and many people are injured. Yat-yin, Kin-pong and other medical staff try their best to save the injured. They even perform emergency surgery under the difficult conditions at the scene. The activities are captured by reporters’ cameras.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 37
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 5
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 889
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 36
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 7
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 8
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 21
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sing manages to stay alive as Yui-fai donates a kidney to him, but his health has deteriorated. A male skull is found on a hillside beside Zodiac HK Hospital. The deceased is Chiu Ting-kwok, whom Yat-yin has been looking for. Yi-ka leads a task force to look into the issue of taking kickbacks from contractors.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 22
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Tak-kiu asks someone to gain understanding of the Chiu Ting-kwok murder case. Kam-wing’s safe astonishing contains Chiu Ting-Kwok’s staff card! Tak-kiu approaches Kam-wing and asks him something. The duo unhappily goes their separate ways. Kam-wing is arrested by the police on suspicion of murdering Chiu Ting-kwok, and he takes the blame for everything.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 23
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan abruptly faints, and Yat-yin adheres to medical ethics and performs first aid on her. Yi-ka tries to ask Tak-kiu for help, but Tak-kiu is not in Hong Kong and cannot be contacted. Yat-yin resorts to asking Ngai Hau-tong for help. Hau-tong buys the site, and the matter seems to be concluded.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 24
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan, Kai-shum and their chums team up to raise funds, causing Zodiac HK Hospital share price to plummet abnormally. They then launch a hostile takeover. Lau-suet and Kai-ching are persuaded to sell their Zodiac shares, but they both simply refuse. Kai-shum’s funds are withheld by Wing-sing because Wing-sing does not want Yui-fai to be implicated due to market manipulation.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 25
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Heavy rain has caused serious car accidents, and many people are injured. Yat-yin, Kin-pong and other medical staff try their best to save the injured. They even perform emergency surgery under the difficult conditions at the scene. The activities are captured by reporters’ cameras.

programme.title: Honour - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 4
programme.desc: The news of yet another death leaves Pan-ho shaken. Scared for his life, Lee Cheong-gang hands over important evidence to Detective Jang.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 37
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Honour - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 5
programme.desc: Pan-ho overcomes his own despair quickly and meets with Detective Jang. Gang-heon begins to manipulate evidence surrounding Sang-hyuk’s case.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 16
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 17
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 11
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 18
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Honour - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 6
programme.desc: Kang So-young attacks Gang-heon at his weakest link. Pan-ho evades Gang-heon’s watch for a lunch appointment, but he meets an unexpected figure.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 22
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 13
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 5
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 8
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 20
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 21

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 21

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 7
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 11
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 12
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 13
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 35
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: An illegitimate daughter of a businessman gets three wishes from a genie, Bo. However, Bo's magical power is far from perfect, leading to much hilarity in this charming fantasy comedy.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Mr. Virgin is a romantic comedy about a twenty-nine year-old man Chao Yu-ting (Alfred Chang) who has seemingly been cursed. He becomes paranoid when a Feng Shui expert tells him it will be unlucky for him to marry before the age of thirty... so comical chaos line the days up to his next birthday!

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building - only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family's massacre years ago. While taking on the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that was planned for years and has to use his skills as an assassin to solve whatever comes his way.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: King Kong comes to Hong Kong in THE MIGTHY PEKING MAN, a uniquely Shaw Brothers spin on the ageless theme of beauty and the beast. The beast, seven stories high and hailing from the Himalayas, makes his way to the jungles of India in the wake of a violent earthquake. The beauty is Russia starlet Evelyne Kraft, a sexy blonde Tarzanette who is the Mighty Peking Man's best friend.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: A Buddhist monk and Taoist priest put aside their differences to take on vampires that have been struck by lightning and have now become a super powered threat to mankind.

programme.title: Love on Delivery
programme.desc: A delivery boy Yin wants to impress his dream girl Li, so he enrols in a martial arts course to learn strange moves. Being timid, Yin saves Li while wearing a Garfield mask but the credit is stolen by Karate Master, Liu. To prove himself and win Li back, Yin defeats Liu in the ring with his unique martial arts move "Invincible Wind and Fire Spin".

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called "Kung Fu Stuntmen". This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: A girl Marble witnesses a murder case and reports it to the police. After much investigation, the police can only sort out the complicated relationships between a rich merchant's mistress, a postman, a shop owner and his wife, but find no clue as to who the murderer is. Therefore, Marble decides to carry out her own investigation...

programme.title: Casino Tycoon II
programme.desc: This is a sequel to "Casino Tycoon". 20 years after Benny Ho established his casino empire in Macau, his former partner becomes envious and plots to bring him down. At the same time, a young man working for Benny is the son of his ex-lover, and is also out to take revenge on him. Ho however, is not about to take things lying down...

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: It's an erotic gore-fest starring Kao Fei who seeks vengeance against his wife's rapists and killers by soliciting the help of a demented magician. In return, he endures copulating dead bodies as his enemies perish in blood spurting and body exploding glory. It's one of Hong Kong goriest films ever made.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Lawyer Yip defends a rapist and gets him acquitted. Yip's boyfriend Fong, a police inspector, knows he is guilty and despises Yip for not upholding justice. The victim's sister takes revenge by spiking the rapist's drink but is raped instead. This puts the rapist back in court. Will Yip choose to uphold law or justice this time?

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing and his brother arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune. Befriending a powerful mobster Tam, Ma is given his nightclub when he saves Tam's life. Ma's fortune rises but he must overcome the corruption and violence to survive.

programme.title: Initial D
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from a famous Japanese manga. 18-year-old Takumi delivers tofu in his father's near-obsolete car every day and becomes a good racer with perfect drifting skill. Encouraged by his father, he joins a mountain race and unexpectedly wins it, making him famous overnight and leading him from one exciting race to another.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him...

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Wing Chun grandmaster Ip Man's matchless fighting skills are revered all over China. Set during the Sino-Japanese War, Ip Man is forced to leave his home and work to support his family. With only his martial arts skills, he reluctantly agrees to train others in the art of Wing Chun for self-defense.

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its "Cop Shop Babes" as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat - can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Teenage Dreamers
programme.desc: Ting Ting is a student in an all-girl high school. She tries out for the school's stage production of Romeo and Juliet with an all-boy school and promptly falls for the lead, Jackson. While Ting Ting is swept away by the excitement of her first love, Jackson turns out to be more of a player than a partner.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: Hong Kong Playboys
programme.desc: Sheng is a rich playboy who lives a carefree and fun life with the ladies, until his mother decides that he should get married. Up against other lady killers in his quest to find Miss Right, Sheng must decide what he wants.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: Mahjong Heroes
programme.desc: A hero helps a young student deflect a cunning and malicious gambling tycoon who is out to take over the student's family business over a game of mahjong.

programme.title: Skyline Cruisers
programme.desc: Four professional thieves are tasked with stealing a cancer vaccine, but they are shocked to discover a pre-set bomb in the laboratory and realize it is a setup against them. Suddenly, a mysterious girl appears, holding a crucial clue that could unravel the conspiracy...

programme.title: Challenge of the Gamesters
programme.desc: A gambling master and his partner are hired by the government to investigate another gambler who may be working as a Japanese spy in Shanghai.

programme.title: Usurpers Of Emperor's Power
programme.desc: The last ruler of Tang, Li Yao is deposed by Chao Kuang-jun, the founder of the Sung Dynasty. Unfortunately his actions unleash a new plague - his brother Kuang-yi - on the courts and his people. The marauding Kuang-yi rapes and plunders. As more people get involved, it turns into a bloody battlefield of betrayal. It is up to upright officials like Li Lang to put an end to it. But can one man take on the imperial army?

programme.title: Asia-pol
programme.desc: Asiapol agent Yang Ming Xuan trails a shipment of contraband gold being delivered to gang leader, George Eaton. He enlists the help of a Chinese woman who is trying to avenge her sister and narrowly escapes several deadly traps as he closes in on Eaton's location. This spy film is loosely inspired by the James Bond movies.

programme.title: Ghosts Galore
programme.desc: Young Taoist priest Lu and his friend are nearly killed by a female ghost during an exorcism. Luckily, Master Lian saves their lives, so they beseech him to teach them his skills. When his friend is killed by ruthless ninjas, Lu decides to learn the ultimate witchcraft and teams up with his master to defeat them.

programme.title: Love With The Perfect Stranger
programme.desc: After breaking up with his girlfriend, salesman Bao meets a rich girl, Jin Jin, who just broke up with her boyfriend. Two equally heartbroken strangers fall in love instantly and get married on impulse. The couple lives happily together until Jin Jin finds herself pregnant with her ex-boyfriend's baby...

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: A rich girl Yue Ying, together with her maid Chun Lan, encounter a poor scholar Bian Ji at a fete. Chun Lan realizes Yue Ying is in love with him, but mixes his identity with a bandit due to an old servant's confusion, threatening the couple's union. After a series of complications, misunderstandings and mismatches, Chun Lan finally saves the day.

programme.title: Shadow Girl
programme.desc: A young swordswoman becomes invisible during the day and a monster at night after taking her grandma's pill. She ruined the wedding of a bandit chief's daughter using her powers and is hunted down by them for revenge. Will she escape the hunt?

programme.title: Hong Kong Nocturne
programme.desc: This joyous, raucous, & colorful tunefest showcases the little seen dancing talents of celebrated kung-fu swordswoman Cheng Pei-Pei, as one of 3 girls dancing their way to the top.

programme.title: The Vengeful Beauty
programme.desc: The Flying Guillotine assassins are secretly working for the Emperor and its leader Jin is sent to kill Hon, who knows this secret. Hon's pregnant wife Rong seeks to kill Jin but retreats to protect her unborn child. When she is hunted down herself, Rong hooks up with a former Flying Guillotine member and her martial arts senior to fight back...

programme.title: The Butterfly Chalice
programme.desc: In the Ming Dynasty, scholar Tian Yu Chuan defends a fisherman's honour but accidentally kills the governor's son, driving him into exile. Pursued to the river's edge, he is rescued by the fisherman's daughter. Amid danger, love blossoms between them, and Tian seals their bond with his family heirloom, the Butterfly Chalice.

programme.title: Journey of the Doomed
programme.desc: Journey Of The Doomed stars Tung Wei as a knight that finds himself protecting the life of a beautiful young lady, the lost Emperor's daughter and stalked by a bunch of assassins headed by kung fu actress extraordinaire Hui Ying-Hung.

programme.title: The 82 Tenants
programme.desc: Continuing the success of the classic comedy "House of 72 tenants", this sequel tells the stories of tenants living in an old building in Hong Kong who are forced to evict by the developers. Some tenants prefer to take the compensation while some resist the move. Will the acquisitions plan destroy the harmony of the neighborhood?

programme.title: Golden Swallow
programme.desc: A heroine finds herself in a love triangle with a swordsman and a warrior. They team up to conquer the evil forces of the martial arts world but she is unable to choose between both men even as they face a deadly duel.

programme.title: The Big Sting
programme.desc: Three buddies find a rare artifact known as the Double-Faced God but are poisoned by Lady Wu who steals the treasure from them. Before they die, they get their wives to promise to train their children to take back what is rightfully theirs. These kids grow up to exact a vengeance that turns out to be more hilarious than horrific in this comedy.

programme.title: Legendary Weapons of China
programme.desc: Lei Kung, the leader of the Boxer Clan in Yunnan, dissolves the clan to save his disciples before going into self-exile. The Clan sends various assassins to kill him but failed. They then assigned Kung's brother Yong to find and kill Kung, leading to a battle between the two brothers.

programme.title: Les Belles
programme.desc: Acknowledged as one of the greatest Hong Kong musicals, this lavish movie starring Linda Lin, who won Best Actress for her performance, infuses its wispy plot with style and wit, and the results are pure pleasure.

programme.title: The Reckless Cricket
programme.desc: Inspired by "Drunken Master", this kung fu comedy features a bumbling martial artist creating a cricket-style fighting arts to fight and defeat the different martial artists who have beaten him before.

programme.title: Dawn will Come
programme.desc: Liang Cai drugged the beautiful Qiu Rong and raped her, but promised to marry her after getting his parent's consent. Since then, there is no news of his proposal and Qiu Rong confronts Liang Cai when she finds herself pregnant. This is when she discovers that he has already married a rich noble girl and even plans to kill her...

programme.title: The Jade Raksha
programme.desc: A fearsome swordswoman known as The Jade Raksha appears in the martial arts world and begins killing people whose surname is Yan. A swordsman figures out who she is and asks her why. Apparently a Yan killed her family 18 years ago and she only has vengeance on her mind...

programme.title: The Merry Wife
programme.desc: A 17-year old schoolgirl marries her 35-year-old teacher. Comedy ensues when they attempt to keep their relationship a secret despite being in the same school. When they discover unwanted suitors going after their other halves, jealousy threatens to expose their marriage any minute!

programme.title: Ode to Gallantry
programme.desc: In this surprisingly light-hearted "Venoms" martial arts adventure, a lone wanderer is repeatedly mistaken for someone else and drawn into a number of violent battles.

programme.title: Human Lanterns
programme.desc: Zhao was once defeated by Long in a duel. 7 years later, Long asks Zhao to make a unique lantern on his behalf to win the lantern contest, while Zhao plans for revenge. When Long's wife suddenly disappears one day and he hears about the story of human lanterns, Long suspects Zhao may be involved in the incident...

programme.title: Holy Flame of the Martial World
programme.desc: Yin Tian Chou's parents were killed over a pair of flame-shaped blades. He and his sister were rescued, raised, and trained separately by a hero and a villain, each inheriting one of the blades. Sworn enemies at first, they eventually uncover their true identities and join forces to avenge their parents' deaths.

programme.title: Forever Diamonds
programme.desc: Hua, a pretty fraud, steals a brilliant diamond ring from a shop in Hong Kong and escapes to Singapore. To smuggle the ring pass customs, Hua slips it into the pocket of a stranger, Yen, but then lost track of him. Hua finally spots Yen after searching for days and does everything to get close to him in order to take the ring back.

programme.title: The Dragon Creek
programme.desc: This wuxia murder mystery film talks about a young girl whose father was ruthlessly murdered during China's early republican era. She has a list of villains who have been plotting against her father and together with her elder brother, the young girl sets out on a journey to hunt down the secret serial killer.

programme.title: Carry on Doctors and Nurses
programme.desc: At St. Morant Hospital, a harried but lovely administrator must deal with lusty interns, student nurses, a delirious surgeon, a dissection fiend, a criticizing Commissioner and gross negligence at regular intervals! This comedy is based on the hugely successful British Carry On! film series.

programme.title: Challenge of the Masters
programme.desc: Young Wong Fei Hung must prove himself worthy to be taught by Master Lu, who was also his father's martial arts teacher. Although he is defeated in a competition, Wong Fei Hung's passion in Kung Fu finally moves Lu and allows him to become Lu's disciple.

programme.title: Love Parade
programme.desc: Fashion designer Shi asks his friend Mui to comment on his new design but is angered by her criticism. When Mui asks him to design a gown for her to attend a gala event, Shi takes revenge by making a clown costume instead. Seeing Mui's embarrassment, Shi feels guilty and apologizes to her, before they fall in love...

programme.title: The Master Of Kung Fu
programme.desc: The famous kung fu master Wong Fei Hung teaches martial arts in Guangdong. A vicious gangster plots to harm Wong's disciples and frames him for robbery and murder. Wong has to fight against the culprit to prove his own innocence and take revenge for his disciples.

programme.title: The Purple Shell
programme.desc: Hui and Ha are stuck in their unhappy marriages and are attracted to each other when they meet at a party. In one of their beach strolls, Ha picks up a purple shell and gives it to Hui as a memento. When Hui's husband finds out about them, he hurts Hui and causes her to become seriously ill, while also blackmails Ha. How will this love story end?

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money! Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Super Taste
programme.desc: Super Taste is a food and travel program that takes you across Taiwan and around the world, discovering local delicacies and experiencing the most authentic travel adventures.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: TVBS News
programme.desc: A news programme that provides the latest Taiwan and international news, as well as in-depth analyses of important issues around the world.

programme.title: TVBS News
programme.desc: A news programme that provides the latest Taiwan and international news, as well as in-depth analyses of important issues around the world.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go
programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng and Hsu Nai Lin, this top Taiwan variety show, splits celebrity guests into two teams to battle in various game segments.

programme.desc: A three-generation family travels and explores local cuisine together. Through differing perspectives and shared experiences, they connect across generations with food, fun, and everyday moments.

programme.title: TVBS Sisy's Finance Weekly
programme.desc: Stay with Host Sisy Chen and the experts for the latest in global news, financial updates and current political events.

programme.title: Super Taste: Go Bananas! Corp.
programme.desc: Super Taste focuses on funny travel style to discover destinations and local-dishes. Standing on audience's view point, program's hosts introduce every sightseeing sites with close-witness, young and humorous way to announce the spirits of Super Taste.

programme.title: James' Going Places - EP 87
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 94
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.title: Hot Door Night - EP 161
programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: Infinity and Beyond 3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Embark on a musical journey with 12 exceptional singers, exploring the cultural history of the past century. The show introduces themed competitions between two teams, creating a harmonious exploration of cultural evolution through popular music.

programme.title: James' Going Places - EP 87
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Special Flavor - EP 2
programme.desc: 17 years away, a Northeasterner still cooks sweet & sour pork. A Guizhou chef imports wild tomatoes for authentic sour soup. Two food journeys, one city.

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 77
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 94
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.title: Second Time Around
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A young casino dealer heads to Las Vegas with his friend to prove he can win big, but disaster strikes. After a car accident, he survives while uncovering a legend of special stones linked to time travel. Pursued by a detective, he is sent back in time, where he seeks to set things right and discovers love along the way.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 102
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 10
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 23

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 889
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 21
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 25
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Heavy rain has caused serious car accidents, and many people are injured. Yat-yin, Kin-pong and other medical staff try their best to save the injured. They even perform emergency surgery under the difficult conditions at the scene. The activities are captured by reporters’ cameras.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 37
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 5
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 889
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 36
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 7
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 8
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 21
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sing manages to stay alive as Yui-fai donates a kidney to him, but his health has deteriorated. A male skull is found on a hillside beside Zodiac HK Hospital. The deceased is Chiu Ting-kwok, whom Yat-yin has been looking for. Yi-ka leads a task force to look into the issue of taking kickbacks from contractors.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 22
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Tak-kiu asks someone to gain understanding of the Chiu Ting-kwok murder case. Kam-wing’s safe astonishing contains Chiu Ting-Kwok’s staff card! Tak-kiu approaches Kam-wing and asks him something. The duo unhappily goes their separate ways. Kam-wing is arrested by the police on suspicion of murdering Chiu Ting-kwok, and he takes the blame for everything.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 23
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan abruptly faints, and Yat-yin adheres to medical ethics and performs first aid on her. Yi-ka tries to ask Tak-kiu for help, but Tak-kiu is not in Hong Kong and cannot be contacted. Yat-yin resorts to asking Ngai Hau-tong for help. Hau-tong buys the site, and the matter seems to be concluded.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 24
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan, Kai-shum and their chums team up to raise funds, causing Zodiac HK Hospital share price to plummet abnormally. They then launch a hostile takeover. Lau-suet and Kai-ching are persuaded to sell their Zodiac shares, but they both simply refuse. Kai-shum’s funds are withheld by Wing-sing because Wing-sing does not want Yui-fai to be implicated due to market manipulation.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 25
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Heavy rain has caused serious car accidents, and many people are injured. Yat-yin, Kin-pong and other medical staff try their best to save the injured. They even perform emergency surgery under the difficult conditions at the scene. The activities are captured by reporters’ cameras.
